title: The Born-Oppenheimer Approximation
description: Understand how separating nuclear and electronic motion makes molecular quantum mechanics tractable, forming the foundation for all practical quantum chemistry calculations.
learningObjectives: Explain the physical basis of the Born-Oppenheimer approximation
Derive the electronic and nuclear Schrödinger equations
Understand the concept of potential energy surfaces
Recognize when the approximation breaks down
Connect Born-Oppenheimer to quantum computing applications
